name: pr-description
description: Always-on pull request description posture for AI coding agents: fill a repo's PR template when present, otherwise write a title in Conventional Commits form and a body covering what, why, how it was verified, and risk, with tracking references in the footer and no AI attribution.

source.title: PR Description Convention
source.relationship: Authored as a portable baseline pack to sit alongside commit-conventions and git-collaboration-hygiene, governing the human-facing PR body rather than the commit message. Kept generic so it applies to work and personal repositories.
